channel.title: flove making-of — languages questions
channel.description: New languages design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should flove handle internationalization beyond en/es?
item.description:
• Community translations — Users contribute translations via PRs. Slow, high quality. • AI translation — Auto-translate with AI. Fast, variable quality, needs review. • en/es only — Keep it bilingual. Simplest, matches current capacity. • Framework ready — en/es now, but build the i18n framework so adding languages is easy later.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: en/es only
